docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES ARE MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2022 - CONTINUED TO BE HEARD WITH RELATED CASE 22-865446 ON JUN-20-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT SCOTT HERNANDEZ WAIVES SERVICE FOR THIS CASE ON MAY-05-2022 DURING RELATED CASE HEARING. ***ZOOM APPEARANCES FOR BOTH PARTIES ARE GRANTED*** BOTH PARTIES ORALLY STIPULATE ALLOW A JUDGE PRO TEM TO HEAR THE CASE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-18-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF VLADIMIR SARSER IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT SCOTT HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT VIA MEDIATION PRIOR TO THE COURT FOR ALIANZA, INC. AKA ALIANZA, LLC TO MAKE A PAYMENT OF $6800 TO THE SCOTT HERNANDEZ. PARTIES FURTHER AGREE THAT MR. HERNANDEZ WILL NOT HAVE ANY UNSOLICITED CONTACT WITH THE CLIENTS OF ALIANZA, INC. AKA ALIANZA, LLC AND BOTH PARTIES WILL CEASE COLLECTION RELATED ACTIVITIES FOR THEIR RESPECTIVE CLAIMS INCLUDING RELATED CASE CSM-22-865446. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JULY 18TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE, OR IF THE PAYMENT IS FRUSTRATED. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. GRANTED ZOOM APPEARANCES FOR BOTH PARTIES ARE EXTENDED TO THE JULY 18TH HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FOR BOTH RELATED CASES CSM-22-865575 & CSM-22-865446
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SARSER, VLADIMIR AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, SCOTT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CONTINUE TO BE HEARD WITH RELATED CASE 22-865446
ORDER OF DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
